rationale: Guidance specifies concrete file size limits (500MB individual, 2GB per session), supported types (PDF, CSV, JPEG, PNG, DOCX), and performance targets (upload within 60 seconds over 50 Mbps, progress updates <500ms). Acceptance criteria detail resumable upload capability (checkpoint resumption at 75% without loss), virus scanning (ClamAV within 10 seconds), and security controls (MIME validation, random filename generation, S3 AES-256 encryption). Reliability requirements specified (99.99% durability, 30-day backup retention). Token reduction from replacing 'efficiently', 'good security', 'improved reliability' with specific technical implementations and measured performance targets.
